channel.title: Infrastructure on The Guyana Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Infrastructure on The Guyana Brief

item.title: 📈 Weekly Progress Report: January 8-15, 2026
item.description: A factual summary of PPP/C government accomplishments for the week of January 8-15, 2026. No commentary, just documented achievements and initiatives.

item.title: Tuesday's Guyana Brief: Apps, Laws, and Courtroom Drama
item.description: Attorney General scolds magistrates for ignoring laws, government promises 87 new apps, and President Ali discovers swamps can become highways (who knew?). Welcome to Tuesday in paradise!

item.title: Uncle Ramesh: The Brief Jokes About Laws While Missing the Point Entirely!
item.description: Uncle Ramesh sets the record straight on judicial reforms, explains why apps ARE revolutionary, and defends the gas-to-energy project the Brief clearly doesn’t understand.

item.title: 🔍 [CRITICAL] Monday Brief: Crime Stats, Search & Rescue Upgrade, and Traffic Chaos
item.description: Murders up 11% despite overall crime drop, new $123M search and rescue system launched, over 3,100 traffic offences in one week, and financial system reforms promised.
